description: arXiv:2508.03174v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Collaborative partnerships play a crucial role in inquiry-oriented education. However, most learning partners are currently assigned through experience-driven heuristics or rule-based machine assistants, which often result in limited knowledge expansion and low adaptability. To address these challenges, this study introduces InqEduAgent, an LL...
author: Wen-Xi Yang, Tian-Fang Zhao, Guan Liu
